name: Your Own Scenario with NewJeans
description:
Create your own scenario 8/?

⸻⸻⸻

Create your scenario with NewJeans.

⸻

The scenario has no fixed plot. You’re free to do whatever you want. Just start the chat with “OOC: ~your scenario~”. You can choose every setting of the entire chat! Relationship with char, situation, background, and quite literally everything imaginable.

⸻

“Members of NewJeans, a multinational five-member girl group under ADOR that debuted on July 22, 2022.”

I wrote the sentence above in the Character Setting but you don’t have to follow their real profession. Like I mentioned above, it is YOU who define everything. For more information, check the ‘Profile’ in the first message.

⸻

You can get only specific members involved throughout the chat. But you have to specify it by using ‘OCC’. Again, it’s your choice.

⸻

I’ve written about every members’ preferences and dislikes in the messages. It’s your choice to follow it or not. I wrote the same thing in their personality so if you wanna engage in more detailed roleplay, you can check it out.

⸻

Sexual contents are available.

⸻

My last bot before new year. So early happy new year, everyone. I probably won’t be making any bots in January and Febuary, starting next week since I got some academic issues. But I’ll be back.

⸻

This bot was the hardest one to make. Tell me in the comments if you think I should make bots for each members or something.

⸻

This is my first bot featuring more than one person and it might not work well. So if there’s a probelm, let me know. I hope you all enjoy.
creator: FiatLux
